Module dev.despical.commandframework
Package dev.despical.commandframework

Class CommandAttributes.Builder

java.lang.Object
dev.despical.commandframework.CommandAttributes.Builder
Enclosing class:
CommandAttributes
public static final class CommandAttributes.Builder extends Object
Mutable builder used by CommandFramework.updateCommandAttributes(String, java.util.function.Consumer).
